what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata entry for an image asset named p-10 in the design-source channel, recording identifiers, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, creation time, links, and a one-line source ground-truth note.
observations: YAML frontmatter with ledger-style metadata fields
standouts: w and h are 0 despite being an image entry
the blob is the only content pointer
the file is explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured ledger metadata
Includes a source ground-truth note after the frontmatter
concerns: Zero width/height suggests missing or failed image dimension extraction
No descriptive caption or alt text for the image
No links to related pitches or design artifacts
notes: A minimal provenance stub for a design-source pitch image with a valid blob pointer but missing dimensions and no descriptive context.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0?

purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a source design ground-truth image ledger entry matches the content, but the zero dimensions mean the metadata is incomplete.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register a design-source image asset in the channel memory ledger so it can be retrieved later and attributed to an author/session.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, author-attributed blob pointer for a design-source pitch image, supporting retrieval and provenance tracking without making any comparative or canonical claim.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the design-source image recent-pitches/p-10.jpg, recording its blob reference, MIME type, author session, creation time, zero dimensions, and empty links.
